description: Run multi-step Antigravity work without drift. v2.0 adds hooks-based enforcement (11 Antigravity lifecycle events), directive-contract pre-approval, scope-lock authority, intake skill, persistent run memory, and an MCP Mem0 layer for cross-session continuity. Three modal gates plus hook-layer enforcement: SessionStart/UserPromptSubmit/PreToolUse/PermissionRequest/PostToolUse/PostToolUseFailure/PreCompact/PostCompact/SubagentStop/Stop/SessionEnd. Codex stays lighter; Antigravity takes the heavier hand.
name: agent-pipeline-antigravity
